title: Package Update Flow
activity_flow: START: InstallationManager::execute(repo, operations, devMode, runScripts, downloadOnly)
PARTITION operations into batches: plugin-modifies-downloads packages get isolated batch
FOR each batch → call downloadAndExecuteBatch(repo, batch, cleanupPromises, ...)
FOR each operation (install/update only, skip uninstall):
→ LibraryInstaller::download(): resolve installPath, call DownloadManager::download(package, targetDir, prevPackage)
DECISION: sourceFallback enabled AND alternative sources remain?
YES → retry download with next source
AWAIT all download promises via Loop::wait(promises)
Re-partition operations: composer-plugin / composer-installer packages get isolated batch
FOR each sub-batch → call executeBatch(repo, subBatch, cleanupPromises, devMode, runScripts, allOps)
IF alias op (markAliasInstalled / markAliasUninstalled): call directly, skip rest
THEN: call this->update(repo, operation) [or install / uninstall]
ON RuntimeException + interactive: ask user to reinstall
ON ERROR: io->writeError('<error>update of X failed</error>') + rethrow
AWAIT all prepare+execute+cleanup promises via Loop::wait()
notifyInstalls(io) → HTTP POST to package notification URLs

key_methods.InstallationManager::execute: Entry point; batches operations, delegates to downloadAndExecuteBatch, writes repo
key_methods.InstallationManager::downloadAndExecuteB: Phase 1: parallel async downloads. Phase 2: sequential execution per sub-batch
key_methods.InstallationManager::executeBatch: Dispatches pre/post events, calls prepare→op→cleanup chain as async promise
key_methods.InstallationManager::update: Resolves installer; same-type → installer.update(); cross-type → uninstall+install
key_methods.LibraryInstaller::update: removeBinaries(old) → updateCode() → installBinaries(new) → swap repo entries
key_methods.DownloadManager::download: Selects dist/source preference, loops sources with fallback on failure
key_methods.InstallationManager::runCleanup: On error/signal: aborts jobs, awaits all cleanup promises

key_decisions: Is package a 'composer-plugin' with plugin-modifies-downloads? → isolate in own batch (download phase)
Is package a 'composer-plugin' or 'composer-installer'? → isolate in own batch (execute phase)
downloadOnly == true? → skip execution phase, run cleanup
Download source: dist or source? → resolvePackageInstallPreference() + preferDist/preferSource flags
Download failed (RuntimeException)? → fallback to alternative source if sourceFallback enabled
initialType == targetType? → update in-place vs uninstall+reinstall
Downloader type changed between versions? → remove old dir, install fresh
runScripts == true AND eventDispatcher != null? → dispatch PRE/POST package events
key_relationships: InstallationManager depends_on InstallerInterface (registry by package type)
DownloadManager depends_on DownloaderInterface (per dist-type: zip, tar, git, svn, etc.)
DownloadManager uses Filesystem for directory management
async_model: React\Promise async pipeline: download → prepare → execute → cleanup → repo.write, all awaited via Loop::wait()
error_handling: Any exception in execute() → runCleanup then rethrow
Download RuntimeException → source fallback retry loop (unless IrrecoverableDownloadException)
Update RuntimeException (interactive mode) → offer reinstall option
Per-op errors logged as '<error>update of X failed</error>' then rethrown
